pains: Too many manual touches between ERP, WMS, and spreadsheets
Exceptions derail the day (late ASN, short picks, EDI errors)
Chasing approvals and status over email and chat
Pressure to hit OTD while short-staffed
objections: We don't have time to implement another tool
IT is busy; integrations will stall
We tried workflow in the WMS and it didn't stick
triggers: Seasonal peak or new customer SLAs
desired_outcomes: Faster exception resolution with clear ownership
segments.cta_language: See how it works in your process

pains: Rising cost per order and missed OTIF penalties
Lack of governance and audit trails for customers/compliance
Difficulty proving ROI of ops initiatives
objections: We have workflow modules already—why add another platform?
Will this survive system upgrades or vendor changes?
triggers: Board-level focus on cost per order
New enterprise customer with strict SLAs
desired_outcomes: 8–15% reduction in cost per order (12 months)
segments.cta_language: Book a strategy demo with ROI model
recommended_assets: Benchmark slides: 2026 State of Ops Automation

notes: If role is unknown, start neutral; detect role based on title keywords (manager/supervisor vs director/VP). Adjust CTA: Managers -> 'See how it works'; Directors -> 'Book a strategy demo with ROI model'.
